question: Quelles verifications deterministes l'agent doit-il executer localement avant de presenter son travail a l'humain ?

principles.text: L'agent doit executer localement un pipeline deterministe obligatoire avant de presenter son travail : typecheck + lint + unit tests + build + SAST + dependency audit. Ne jamais accepter le self-report de l'agent comme seule evidence de correction. Le CI seul (post-PR) est trop tardif : il decale la charge de verification sur l'humain. Les pre-commit hooks seuls sont insuffisants (typecheck + build absents).

sources.name: NIST AI 600-1 §2.2 Confabulation risk category
sources.quote: Confabulations have been shown to be pervasive in current state-of-the-art LLMs

sources.name: METR 2025 - Measuring the Impact of Early-2025 AI on Experienced OSS Developers RCT
sources.quote: when developers use AI tools, they take 19% longer than without

sources.name: Anthropic Claude Code Auto Mode documentation
sources.quote: A separate classifier model reviews actions before they run, blocking anything that escalates beyond your request

sources.name: Faros AI DORA 2025 - PR review time impact
sources.quote: Median time in PR review is up 441%, compared to 91% in our 2025 dataset

etd_balance.benefices: Feedback loop objectif, reduction hallucination code (tests passent ou non)
etd_balance.risques: METR RCT montre -19% productivity experts avec AI, tests flaky
etd_balance.balance: Equilibre tendance Benefices si tests robustes
